title: Long Distance Transportation - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Transportation > Long Distance Transportation 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AMTRAK AMTRAK TRAIN SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-distance and international train service to various locations. Discounted fares may be available. Website Washington, DC 20001 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by station (800) 331-0008 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GORGE TRANSLINK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An alliance of rural providers offering public transportation services throughout the Mid-Columbia River Gorge area and to more distant destinations, such as Portland, Oregon, and Vancouver, Washington. 802 Chenowith Loop Road The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-4202 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GREYHOUND GREYHOUND PORTLAND GREYHOUND BUS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-distance and international bus service to various locations in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. Discounted fares are available for children, active and retired members of the US Armed Forces, and seniors. Online form to report lost and found or damaged items. 1090 NW Station Way Portland Curbside Bus Stop Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (800) 231-2222 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION TRANSIT AND TAXI SERVICE FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an online search tool to help locate local bus services, shuttle services, taxi services, Dial-a-Ride, and long distance bus travel. 355 Capitol Street NE MS 11 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website More Details GORGE TRANSLINK GORGE TRANSLINK GREYHOUND GREYHOUND BUS SERVICES OREGON DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION TRANSIT AND TAXI SERVICE FINDER
